title: August
content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}
'''August''' is the eighth month of the year in the [[Wikipedia:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]. It has 31 days.

==Film releases & TV airings==

*'''Aug 15''' – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']] is released in theaters in 2008.
*'''August 22''' – ''[[Star Wars: Ahsoka]]'' is released in 2023.

==Video game releases==
*'''Aug 21''' – ''[[Star Wars: Commander]]'' is released on iOS and other mobile platforms in 2014.

==Events concerning [[Wookieepedia]]==
*'''Aug 7''' – [[Wookieepedia|Star Wars Wiki]] concept begins to form on Wikipedia in 2004.
*'''Aug 30''' – [[Fanon|Star Wars Fanon Wiki]] is created in 2005.

==Other ''[[Star Wars]]'' events==
*'''Aug 12''' – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (soundtrack)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' soundtrack]] is released in 2008.
